expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Manage workspace membership.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add member invitation flow",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so I can add people without database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can invite members by email.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add member role change action",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role so permissions stay current.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add member revocation action",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so removed members no longer have access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can revoke workspace access.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Review membership audit log in settings page",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so I can audit access changes.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The system records membership changes in an audit log.",
        "Admins can review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002",
        "US-003"
      ],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
